meta.title: Services
meta.description: Comprehensive financial planning services: wealth management, retirement planning, investment management, tax planning, estate coordination, and business owner services.

hero.heading: What We Do.
hero.lede: Six interconnected services designed to work together. We don't sell products. We sell thinking, judgment, and accountability.

services.title: Wealth Management
services.description: Your full financial picture, coordinated. Budgeting and cash flow, tax optimization, investment management, insurance review, and estate coordination — under one roof, with one team.

services.title: Retirement Planning
services.description: 401(k) rollovers, Social Security claiming strategy, withdrawal sequencing, and income mapping. We model 30+ year scenarios so you can see what your decisions actually mean.
services.audience: Anyone within 10 years of retirement — or already there.

services.title: Investment Management
services.description: Diversified, evidence-based portfolios built to your risk profile. No commissions, no proprietary products, no chasing fads. Quarterly reviews and tax-aware rebalancing.
services.audience: Clients who want disciplined long-term investing without the noise.

services.title: Tax Planning
services.description: Year-round tax-loss harvesting, Roth conversion analysis, asset location, charitable giving strategy, and entity structuring advice — coordinated with your CPA, not duplicating their work.
services.audience: High earners and retirees with complex tax pictures.

services.title: Estate Planning Coordination
services.description: We work alongside your attorney to align your financial plan with your legacy goals: trusts, beneficiary reviews, gifting strategies, and generational wealth transfer.
services.audience: Families with estates above $1M, blended families, or business owners.

services.title: Business Owner Services
services.description: Exit planning, business valuation prep, key-person insurance analysis, succession strategy, and post-sale wealth planning. We've helped founders sell — and stay sane.
services.audience: Business owners 5–10 years from exit or actively in transition.

process.heading: A four-step process.
process.lede: Straightforward, paced to your timeline, never rushed.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.body: A 30-minute, no-cost conversation. We learn about you. You learn how we work. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Financial Review & Proposal
steps.body: We analyze your full picture — investments, taxes, goals — and present a written plan with our recommendation.

steps.title: Plan Implementation
steps.body: We execute the agreed-upon plan: account transitions, portfolio restructuring, tax moves, document coordination.

steps.title: Ongoing Partnership
steps.body: Quarterly reviews, annual deep-dives, and on-call access whenever life changes. The plan evolves with you.

fees.heading: Transparent, fee-only. No commissions.
fees.lede: We are a fee-only fiduciary firm. We never earn commissions from any product or platform. Our only compensation comes from our clients — which is the only conflict of interest we're willing to have.
fees.note: Financial plans are also available as flat-fee engagements for clients who don't need ongoing investment management. Pricing depends on complexity and is quoted in writing before any engagement.

cta.heading: Ready to take control of your financial future?
cta.description: A conversation costs nothing. Clarity is the first step toward confidence.
